page_metadata.biotools__summary: Memory-efficient reading, writing, and manipulation of structured binary data on disk as vectors, matrices, and arrays. This package is designed to be used as a back-end for Cardinal for working with high-resolution mass spectrometry imaging data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Memory-efficient reading, writing, and manipulation of structured binary data on disk as vectors, matrices, and arrays. This package is designed to be used as a back-end for Cardinal for working with high-resolution mass spectrometry imaging data.
